notes: provision_client.py loops these and runs `hermes -p <profile> cron create <schedule> <prompt> --skill <skill> --name <name>` for each. Schedules fire in the client's TZ because TZ is set on the gateway service. Prompts are self-contained because cron runs in a fresh session.

jobs.name: morning-checkin
jobs.prompt: This is the MORNING check-in for {{BUSINESS_NAME}}. Follow the daily-checkin skill's morning procedure. Look at recent context, anything time-sensitive in ./brain, and open items in ./output. Surface what matters most to {{SUPERVISOR_NAME}} today and offer the highest-value help tied to their main workloads ({{WORKLOADS}}). Two or three lines, one question. If nothing is worth a text, reply with exactly [SILENT].

jobs.name: midday-checkin
jobs.prompt: This is the MIDDAY check-in for {{BUSINESS_NAME}}. Follow the daily-checkin skill's midday procedure. Light touch only. If something concrete has come up that you can now help with, offer it in a line or two. If there is genuinely nothing worth a text, reply with exactly [SILENT].
